prompt:
Use case: illustration-story
Asset type: character-free 16:9 background plate for scene 2
Input images: Image 1 is the approved style reference only; preserve its visual language, not its exact layout
Primary request: an ancient Chinese mountain-temple courtyard beside a sloping path, with a large water jar near one side and broad open space for two monks carrying a bucket between them
Style/medium: handcrafted layered paper collage with torn rice-paper edges, visible fibers and gentle ink-brush accents
Composition/framing: wide side view, clear horizontal carrying path through the center, uncluttered lower subtitle zone
Lighting/mood: warm late morning, lightly comic
Constraints: no people, no animals, no text, no logo, no watermark, no modern objects; original design unrelated to existing animation compositions
